Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on November 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the 4th Account has not been filed.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Gary Candito (Petitioner).

Ms. Fox stated that the fees were reasonable, that there was no longer any financial abuse and that adequate protections existed in the Conservatorship. The Court approved the Third Account but the request to remove the Trust from Court supervision/jurisdiction was denied without prejudice (subject to the written order which is to be submitted by Ms. Fox). The Court informed Ms. Fox that any further requests for legal services relating to the Conservatorhsip matter needed to be filed under the conservatorship case number.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
